# CWE-455 positive: API continues when TLS material missing (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-455-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

func StartHTTPServer() error {
	cert, err := tls.LoadX509KeyPair("/etc/hsm/tls.crt", "/etc/hsm/tls.key")
	if err != nil {
		log.Printf("hsm tls unavailable, continuing without mTLS: %v", err)
	}
	_ = cert
	http.HandleFunc("/ready", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) { w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK) })
	return http.ListenAndServe(":8443", nil)
}
